question: Comment concevoir des badges de statut dans un design system ?

principles.text: 5-6 variants semantiques (success/warning/error/info/neutral + optionnel accent). Couleur + icone + texte (jamais couleur seule, WCAG 1.4.1). Forme pill. Max 1-2 mots. Ne pas surcharger (3 max par element). Chaque variant doit etre distinguable sans couleur (icone ou forme differente).

sources.name: Carbon Design System Status Indicators
sources.quote: Use shape and icon in addition to color for status

sources.name: Adobe Spectrum Badge
sources.quote: Badges are small, keyword-based status descriptors

sources.name: Baymard Institute Trust Badges
sources.quote: Limit badge count to avoid visual noise

sources.name: WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.1 Use of Color
sources.quote: Color is not used as the only visual means of conveying information

sources.name: GitLab Pajamas Badge
sources.quote: 5 semantic variants with icon+color+text triple encoding
